headline: Semis + storage surge AH: SNDK +21.8%, MU +16%, TECH +20% on 13x vol; desk unanimous on QXO

actions.line: Unanimous desk conviction — signal/research/risk all agree; cleanest setup in the book, full size.
Bullish signal, clean risk; research neutral no veto — majority take, half size.
Research agrees, semi-sector tailwind from MU/SNDK move; split desk keeps size at quarter.

watch.line: +21.8% AH, rel-vol 2x, MACD bullish — storage names catching MU's bid; watch for RTH gap-and-hold.

+16% on 2x vol, MACD bullish — semi catalyst holding; key confirmation for LRCX trade.
